race.comment: I'M GENEVIEVE (6) disappointed last time out at Pinjarra and has been freshened since. Fernie gets her back onto the home deck where she's a winner previously and the booking of Faithfull is a good push for her chances. Draws ideally and she can bounce back to form. LUMINOUS LADY (2) sat handy and got the job done over 1300m last start at this course. Back to 1200m today is a query, but this looks to set up nicely for her once again. Can repeat the dose if she runs up to her recent form. IDEALLY (1) took on much stronger races last campaign and never really got into the race. She's now with the leading Peter Fernie sable and makes plenty of appeal coming here first-up. She creates plenty of interest. SLIPPERY FISH (5) gets the blinkers on for the first time today and can improve third-up into the campaign after bumping into a smart one last time. SHOOT TO FAME (3) won't be far away.
